paymentMethods.point1Body: All payment data is transmitted over TLS. Your card number never passes through our servers.

paymentMethods.point3Body: When you check out with Shop Pay, your payment method is securely stored for faster future purchases.
paymentMethods.point4Body: Hy-lee never sees or stores your card number, CVV, or full payment details.

about.metaDescription: Learn about Hy-lee — a modern marketplace built for small-space living, connecting shoppers with quality products for tiny homes and micro apartments.

hero.heading: Built for the Way You Live
hero.body: Hy-lee is a modern marketplace that curates quality products for small-space living — from tiny homes to micro apartments. We believe that limited square footage should never mean limited lifestyle.

mission.heading: Smart Products for Smaller Spaces
mission.body: We started Hy-lee because we noticed a gap: the big-box stores weren't built for people who live intentionally small. Everything on Hy-lee is selected with one question in mind — does this make a small space feel like a real home?
mission.body2: From multi-functional furniture to space-saving kitchen essentials, every product on our platform is vetted by our team before it reaches your doorstep.

curation.title: Curated Quality
curation.body: Every product is reviewed by our team. If it doesn't meet our standards for build quality and design, it doesn't make the cut.

community.title: Community First
community.body: Our shoppers are our partners. We listen to reviews, act on feedback, and continuously improve the selection based on what you tell us.

simplicity.title: Simplicity by Design
simplicity.body: Shopping should be as clean as the spaces you're building. Hy-lee is fast, intuitive, and free of the noise you find on larger platforms.

trust.title: Transparent Trust
trust.body: No dark patterns. No fake reviews. No hidden fees. What you see is what you get — down to the last detail on every product page.

cta.heading: Ready to find your next favourite thing?

shop.title: Start Shopping
shop.body: Browse thousands of products curated for small-space living.

supplier.title: Become a Supplier
supplier.body: Sell your products to a growing community of intentional shoppers.

returnPolicy.metaDescription: Learn about Hy-lee's hassle-free 30-day return policy, free return shipping, and fast refunds.

hero.title: Return Policy
hero.subtitle: We stand behind every product we sell. If you're not completely satisfied, we make it easy to return or exchange your purchase.

eligibility.title: What Can I Return?
eligibility.body: You may return most items within 30 days of delivery, provided they meet the following conditions:
conditions: Item is unused and in its original condition
Original packaging is intact with all tags attached
All accessories, manuals, and included components are present
Item was purchased directly through Hy-lee

ineligible.title: What Can't Be Returned?
ineligible.body: The following items are not eligible for return:
items: Items marked "Final Sale" or "Non-Returnable" at the time of purchase
Digital products, gift cards, and store credits
Perishable goods and consumable products once opened
Items damaged due to misuse, improper installation, or normal wear and tear

howTo.title: How Do I Start a Return?
howTo.intro: Starting a return takes less than two minutes from your account dashboard:

steps.title: Go to My Orders
steps.body: Sign in to your Hy-lee account and navigate to Account → Orders.

steps.title: Select Your Order
steps.body: Find the order containing the item you wish to return and click "Return Items".

steps.title: Choose Your Items
steps.body: Select the item(s) you want to return and tell us the reason.

steps.title: Pick a Return Method
steps.body: Choose UPS Drop-off, UPS Pickup, or Instant Return (store credit on scan, +$4.99).

steps.title: Ship It Back
steps.body: Print your prepaid label or show the QR code at any UPS location. We cover the cost.

refunds.title: When Will I Receive My Refund?
refunds.body: Once we receive and inspect your return, refunds are issued to your original payment method within 5–7 business days. You will receive an email confirmation when your refund is processed.
refunds.note: Instant Return credit is applied immediately to your account balance upon scan at the drop-off location.

exchanges.title: Can I Exchange an Item?
exchanges.body: Yes. During the return flow, select "Exchange" as your resolution and choose the replacement colour, size, or variant. Exchanges are shipped free of charge once we receive your return.

damaged.title: What If My Item Arrived Damaged or Defective?
damaged.body: We are sorry to hear that. Please contact us within 7 days of delivery with photos of the damage. We will arrange a replacement or full refund at no cost to you — no need to ship the item back.

international.title: International Returns
international.body: For orders shipped outside the United States, return shipping costs are the responsibility of the customer unless the item arrived damaged or defective. Refunds exclude original shipping fees and any customs duties paid.

contact.heading: Still Have Questions?
contact.body: Our support team is available Monday – Friday, 9 am – 6 pm ET.

readyToReturn.heading: Ready to Return?
readyToReturn.body: Sign in to your account to start a return in minutes.

faq.metaDescription: Find answers to frequently asked questions about shopping, shipping, returns, and your account at Hy-lee.
faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find quick answers to common questions about shopping, shipping, returns, and your account.
faq.noResults: No questions match your search. Try different keywords or browse by category below.

contact.heading: Still have questions?
contact.body: Our support team is ready to help you with anything you need.

ordersShipping.q: How do I track my order?
ordersShipping.a: Once your order ships, you'll receive a confirmation email with a tracking number. You can also track your order from the My Orders page in your account dashboard.

ordersShipping.q: How long does standard shipping take?
ordersShipping.a: Standard shipping takes 5–7 business days. We partner with UPS to deliver to all 50 states.
We offer free standard shipping on orders over $75. Orders under $75 are subject to a flat $5.99 shipping fee.

ordersShipping.q: Can I change my shipping address after placing an order?
ordersShipping.a: Address changes can be made within 1 hour of placing your order. Contact our support team immediately and we'll do our best to update the delivery details before the order ships.
Currently we ship within the United States only. International shipping options are on our roadmap and will be announced on our blog.

returnsExchanges.a: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery. Items must be in their original packaging and unused condition. Final sale items are not eligible for return.

returnsExchanges.q: How do I start a return?
returnsExchanges.a: Go to My Orders in your account, find the order, and click 'Return or Replace Items'. Our guided return flow will walk you through selecting items, choosing a reason, and scheduling a pickup or drop-off.

returnsExchanges.q: How long does a refund take?
returnsExchanges.a: Refunds are processed within 5–7 business days after we receive your return. You'll receive an email confirmation once the refund is issued to your original payment method.

returnsExchanges.q: Can I exchange an item instead of returning it?
returnsExchanges.a: Yes! During the return flow, select 'Exchange' as your resolution option. You can swap for a different color, size, or variant of the same product.
Standard return shipping via UPS drop-off is always free. We also offer a scheduled pickup option and an Instant Return option (small fee applies) for added convenience.

accountPayments.q: What payment methods do you accept?
accountPayments.a: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, AmEx, Discover), Shop Pay, Apple Pay, and Google Pay.
Yes. All transactions are processed through Shopify's PCI DSS Level 1 certified infrastructure with 256-bit SSL encryption. Hy-lee never stores your card number or CVV.

accountPayments.q: How do I create an account?
accountPayments.a: Click 'Register' in the top navigation. You'll need your name, email address, and a password. Creating an account gives you access to order history, wishlist, address book, and faster checkout.

accountPayments.q: I forgot my password. How do I reset it?
accountPayments.a: Click 'Sign In', then 'Forgot password?' Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link within a few minutes.

accountPayments.q: Can I use promo codes at checkout?
accountPayments.a: Yes. Enter your promo code in the 'Promo Code' field in your cart before proceeding to checkout. Codes cannot be applied retroactively after an order is placed.

productsInventory.q: How do I know if a product is in stock?
productsInventory.a: Product pages show real-time availability. If an item is out of stock, the 'Add to Cart' button will be replaced with a 'Sold Out' indicator.

productsInventory.q: Can I save a product to buy later?
productsInventory.a: Yes. Click the heart icon on any product card or product page to add it to your Wishlist. You can find your saved items under My Account → Wishlist.
We do not currently offer a formal price-match policy. However, we regularly run promotions and discounts — sign up for our newsletter to stay informed.
Click the compare icon on any product card to add it to your comparison list (up to 4 products). Then click 'Compare Now' to see a side-by-side breakdown of specs and features.
